title: test_admin_login_with_valid_and_invalid_credentials
description: Verify that administrators can successfully log in with valid credentials and receive appropriate error messages when using invalid credentials at the /auth login endpoint.

title: test_onboarding_initial_setup_flow
description: Test the onboarding process by submitting establishment basic data and verifying successful setup and access to the admin dashboard via the /onboarding endpoint.

title: test_establishment_settings_update
description: Validate that establishment information such as name, phone, email, and address can be viewed and updated correctly through the establishment settings API.

title: test_barbers_crud_and_schedule_management
description: Ensure that barbers can be created, updated, deactivated, and their working schedules managed properly, including validation for required fields in the barbers management endpoints.

title: test_services_crud_operations
description: Check that services can be created, updated with price and duration changes, and listed correctly in the services management API.

title: test_clients_management_and_search
description: Verify client creation with name and phone, searching clients by phone or name, and viewing client visit and spending history through the clients management endpoints.

title: test_appointments_create_edit_cancel_with_conflict_rule
description: Test appointment scheduling enforcing one booking per barber per slot, editing appointments to available slots, and cancelling appointments with status updates in the appointments API.

title: test_loyalty_rewards_and_redemptions_view
description: Confirm that the loyalty section allows viewing the list of rewards and past redemptions in a read-only manner via the loyalty API.

title: test_whatsapp_booking_bot_conversational_flow
description: Validate the WhatsApp booking bot's ability to receive messages, auto-create clients, propose services and slots, create appointments after confirmation, and log all interactions through the integrations/whatsapp API.

title: test_admin_inbox_and_conversation_logs_access_and_filtering
description: Ensure administrators can access the internal inbox, view conversation threads with timestamps and actions, and filter/search conversation logs by phone or date via the inbox API.
